title: RFC 9309 Matching, Failure Semantics, Caching, and Go Adapter
description: The crawler trusts a Go package name, matches the first rule, fetches robots from the wrong service, ignores encoded paths, and treats an outage as permission. Learners cumulatively produce conformance-tested robots decision engine through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Fetch `/robots.txt` at the correct service origin with an honest stable product token and contact identity.
Apply RFC 9309 product-token matching, group merge, percent encoding, longest rule, and allow tie behavior.
Classify success, redirects, unavailable, unreachable, oversized, malformed, stale cache, and owner-stop states conservatively.
